allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"show me sales by category"}')
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"show me sales by category and subcategory as a hierarchy"}')
